meta.title: AI factory - HBM test and advanced packaging support

thesis.supertrend: AI factory buildout continues to stress memory, packaging, and deployment infrastructure.
thesis.lane: HBM test and advanced packaging support tools
thesis.thesis_sentence: Test, inspection, and packaging support tools remain enabling layers before AI factory capacity can scale cleanly.
thesis.bottleneck_call: HBM-related test throughput and advanced-packaging inspection remain gating layers.
thesis.weakest_assumption: HBM demand continues translating into packaging and test capex.
thesis.thesis_breaker: If packaging spend stalls, these support layers de-rate quickly.

bottlenecks.label: HBM test enablement
bottlenecks.why_it_matters: HBM supply is unusable without test throughput.

evidence.title: Q1 2026 results
evidence.summary: FormFactor cited record DRAM revenue and HBM demand.

evidence.title: March 2026 Hawk order
evidence.summary: Camtek announced Hawk orders tied to AI applications.

meta.title: AI factory - power and cooling delivery

thesis.supertrend: AI factories are increasingly constrained by physical delivery of power density and thermal management.
thesis.thesis_sentence: The more AI clusters turn into physical factories, the more value shifts toward power delivery and cooling systems that can actually bring the site online.
thesis.bottleneck_call: Power-density upgrades and liquid-cooling deployment become gating layers once compute demand outruns site readiness.
thesis.weakest_assumption: AI deployment pace remains strong enough that power and cooling stay rate-limiting rather than merely cyclical infrastructure upgrades.
thesis.thesis_breaker: If data center build schedules slow or thermal density plateaus, urgency in the lane falls.

bottlenecks.label: Power-density delivery
bottlenecks.why_it_matters: Clusters cannot go live if power and thermal requirements outstrip site readiness.

evidence.title: AI and HPC infrastructure positioning
evidence.summary: Vertiv highlights AI and HPC power and cooling as core infrastructure needs.

evidence.title: Data center power management
evidence.summary: Eaton positions itself around data center power quality and distribution needs.

catalysts.label: AI data center capex updates
catalysts.watch_for: Faster liquid-cooling and electrical retrofit adoption
